meaning: n.葡萄树,蔓生植物(如甜瓜),攀缘植物(如豌豆,蛇麻草),藤,蔓
examples: The easiest way to propagate a vine is to take hardwood cuttings.
A vine wraps round a big tree.
It was the last leaf on the vine.
As with the iOS version, Vine for Android shares many of the same features.
Barely five minutes later, we screeched to a halt next to a tangle of vine, branches and bush.
